Challenge
Dune Hustle Amulet

Once in a while, the unit becomes immune to all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, or fear for 4 sec. Also during this time if the unit gains a debuff, it turns a random enemy to stone for 2 sec. During this time, the petrified enemy cannot move and takes 35% more damage. The ability triggers once per up to 1 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
